word: G2086 - ἑτεροζυγέω - heterozygéō - het-er-od-zoog-eh'-o - Unequally yoke together with

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Unequally yoke together with
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to come under an unequal or different yoke
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From a compound of G2087 and G2218; to yoke up differently, that is, (figuratively) to associate discordantly: - unequally yoke together with.
